name: Case Cards List
description: A vertical list of clickable cards displaying case or item summaries. Used on dashboards for quick access to important items like urgent cases, recent updates, or upcoming deadlines. Each card shows key information and navigates to the detail view when clicked.
whenToUse: On dashboard pages for quick case access
To highlight urgent or important items
When cards provide better scannability than tables

components.name: GoabText
components.purpose: Display case name, ID, and metadata

isOverdue.purpose: Check if a date is past due

example.description: Complete case cards section with urgent cases and upcoming deadlines

variants.name: Compact cards
variants.description: Single line per card for denser display

variants.name: With thumbnail/avatar
variants.description: Include user avatar or case type icon

variants.name: With quick actions
variants.description: Add action buttons directly on cards (approve, reassign)

considerations: Limit to 3-5 cards per section to avoid overwhelming dashboards
Always include 'View all' link to full list
Make entire card clickable for mobile friendliness
Use color-coded text (emergency) for overdue items sparingly
Cards should have hover state indicating clickability
